Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Naian Blackflame]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Black Dragon Prisoner's real name is Naian Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Fury wants Mercy to crush Naian in two seconds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Naian Blackflame is shackled with a red scripted collar and scripted chains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Naian Blackflame does not have the Blackflame eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Naian is a fighter from the Blackflame Empire and the last descendant of their original royal family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Naian Blackflame manifests a sacred instrument from his soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Naian Blackflame's sacred instrument is a squat, wide orange blade that glows like a sunset.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Naian had expected what happened to him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Naian uses razor steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Naian Blackflame was in chains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon absorbed the original Path of Black Flame from Naian.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon recently struggled against Naian Blackflame for control of a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Naian Blackflame's blood was sprayed across the floor by Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Naian Blackflame fought Lindon in battle.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
